== Notes for [[Item:Q84746|Q84746]] ==

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Family_tree_of_Uthman

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uthman_ibn_Affan#Family_of_Uthman

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E31442A5E31EFBC189822EF79916C951E
geni:6000000021371962549

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
